summary: The user inquired about installing the `kcadm.sh` CLI on a Linux box without the full Keycloak server, specifically version 15.0.2. The assistant provided detailed installation steps, including a one-liner command for downloading and extracting the script directly to `/usr/local/bin`, and discussed compatibility concerns between different Keycloak versions.
facts: The user is installing the `kcadm.sh` CLI on a Linux box without the full Keycloak server. The user requested the installation of version 15.0.2 of the `kcadm.sh` script. The assistant provided a one-liner command to download and extract the `kcadm.sh` script from the Keycloak GitHub repository. The command used to install the `kcadm.sh` script was `sudo curl -L https://github.com/keycloak/keycloak/releases/download/15.0.2/keycloak-15.0.2.tar.gz | sudo tar -xz -C /usr/local/bin --strip-components=1 keycloak-15.0.2/bin/kcadm.sh`. The assistant advised that it is best to use the same version of `kcadm.sh` as the Keycloak server for compatibility.
